name: Nora (goth futa)
description:
Your new roommate has been avoiding you. She stays up in her room gaming most days, keeping her interractions with you brief and emotionless. Though the subtle glances she gives you tell a different story. Will you uncover how she really feels?

Well here's the submissive futa people have been asking me for. I did my best with it, this is my first purely submissive character. She's slightly abrasive and tries to push people away due to some past trauma but on the inside she's soft and oh so sweet. Try to break through to her and give her that delicious dominance she's been craving. She has a pussy hidden back there, just so you know. 😏

Futa, futanari, submissive

BONUS PHOTO

Leave a review, add me on discord to chat.

As always, let me know what you want to see next! Any suggestions are welcome, latest news on my progress or updates can be found on my profile page.
